title: Codex 2026 Prompting and Repository Practice · Prompt Lens: Codex Agents Md
summary: Apply current Codex guidance across CLI, IDE, app, planning, and repository instructions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt codex agents md increment in a Codex-specific prompt and AGENTS.md package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Place recurring build, test, lint, review, and boundary guidance in the nearest applicable AGENTS.md.
Use Plan mode or an interview when requirements are fuzzy or choices are consequential.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
